flightsRef: Ref A77762 · $4,087.92 · Economy Light · Non-refundable · Carry-on only (22 lbs/person)

cars.detail: Jun 20 12pm → Jun 22 12pm · Conf. #42334482US1 · $289.00 · Pay at pick-up
Jun 22 12pm → Jul 5 7am · Hertz conf. L5350959316 · CHF 575.92 · Due at pick-up · Jeep Compass or similar · Free cancellation

carsTotalNote: Total car rentals: $1,181.50 · Both pay at pick-up

sections.heading: Day 1 — Golden Circle + South Coast Waterfalls
items: Pick up Iceland car at KEF · depart ~10:30am
Drive 45 min → Kerið Crater — red volcanic walls, vivid aquamarine lake · walk the rim + descend to lake edge · 12:15pm arrive (~45 min · ISK 600)
Drive 15 min → Lunch in Selfoss — Kaffi Krús or Almar Bakari · 1:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 35 min → Geysir — Strokkur erupts every 5–10 min · watch 2–3 eruptions and leave · 2:45pm (~45 min)
⚠️ Gullfoss optional (10 min from Geysir) — Iceland's most powerful two-tier waterfall · add 45 min if energy allows · 3:45pm
Drive 45 min south → Urriðafoss — Iceland's most voluminous waterfall · 2 min off Route 1 · ground trembles from the force · almost nobody here · 5:30pm (~20 min · free)
Drive 15 min → Seljalandsfoss — walk behind the falls · bring waterproofs! · 6:15pm (~1hr)
Gljúfrabúi — hidden canyon waterfall 5 min walk from Seljalandsfoss · most tour buses skip it · genuinely magical (~30 min)
Drive 20 min → Skógafoss — climb the 527 steps for the top view · evening light is spectacular · 8:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 30 min → Stokkseyri — Knarrarósviti lighthouse on the black rocky coast in golden evening light · 9:30pm (~20 min · free)
Drive 5 min → Guesthouse 77, Eyrarbakki — check in ✅

sections.heading: Day 2 — South Coast Full Push
items: Leave Eyrarbakki 7:00am — beat the tour buses
Reynisfjara black sand beach — basalt columns, sea stacks, Reynisdrangar · early morning = almost empty · head to lower Lágey area for puffins (most active before 10am!) · 8:00am (~1hr)
Dyrhólaey arch — clifftop viewpoint · 5 min drive · 9:15am (~30 min)
Vík village — quick coffee · red-roofed church viewpoint · 10:00am (~20 min)
Drive 15 min east → Gígjagjá (Yoda Cave) — lava cave whose entrance silhouettes Yoda · download GPS first, no tourist signs · almost no crowds · 10:30am (~30 min · free)
Drive 50 min east → Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon — 100m deep moss-covered canyon · Game of Thrones dragon location · easy 1hr rim walk · 11:15am (ISK 1000 Parka app)
Lunch in Kirkjubæjarklaustur — 10 min from canyon · 12:30pm (~45 min)
Drive ~2hrs west back toward Skógar · 1:30pm

Sólheimajökull Glacier — 20 min walk from car park to the glacier base · glacier lagoon with floating icebergs · alien black ash streaked through ancient ice · no guide needed just to view · 3:00pm (~45 min · ISK 750 parking)
Kvernufoss — 15 min from Sólheimajökull · park at Skógar Museum · 20-min easy walk · walk BEHIND the waterfall · almost nobody here · 4:00pm (~45 min · ISK 500 parking)
Drive ~30 min → BergOne, Ytri-Njarðvík — check in · 5:15pm ✅
Evening 6:30pm: drive 20 min → Reykjanes Peninsula golden hour — Reykjanesviti lighthouse + Bridge Between Continents · warm evening light · almost nobody here · back by 8:30pm
Early night — 5:15am alarm tomorrow for KEF

tags.text: ⏰ Set alarm 5:15am Jun 22 — drive ~45 min to KEF
🐦 Puffins at Dyrhólaey — head to lower Lágey area · most active before 10am in June
📍 Download Yoda Cave GPS before leaving — no signs on site · search 'Gígjagjá' on Google Maps
💳 Parka app needed: Fjaðrárgljúfur ISK 1000 · Sólheimajökull ISK 750 · Kvernufoss ISK 500
✓ Guesthouse 77 · Night 1 · Booking.com · $212.37
✓ BergOne · Night 2 · Booking.com · $263.98

summary.highlights: Kerið · Geysir · Gullfoss · Urriðafoss · Seljalandsfoss · Gljúfrabúi · Skógafoss · Reynisfjara · Dyrhólaey · Vík · Yoda Cave · Fjaðrárgljúfur · Sólheimajökull · Kvernufoss · Reykjanes golden hour

items: Return Iceland car at KEF · board 7:20am FI568
Land ZRH 1:05pm · pick up Hertz rental car — Hertz desk at Zurich Airport Terminal (Arrivals Hall) · Conf. L5350959316 · Jeep Compass or similar
Drive ~30 min → Thun — walk the medieval old town · covered bridge over the turquoise Aare · Thun Castle viewpoint (free to walk up, ~CHF 10 to enter) · Eiger/Jungfrau backdrop · ~45 min stop
Drive ~15 min → Spiez Castle — 12th-century castle surrounded by vineyards on Lake Thun · stunning Bernese Alps panorama · CHF 10/adult · ~30 min stop
Drive ~30 min → Diemtigtal · check in Tiny House · arrive ~5:30pm ✅
⚠️ If customs/Hertz takes longer than 45 min, skip Thun and do Spiez only (or go straight to Diemtigtal)

tags.text: ✓ Tiny House im schönen Diemtigtal · Airbnb · $255.92 · Jun 22–23 · 1 night
🎟 Spiez Castle: CHF 10/adult · open May–Oct · no booking needed
🏷 At Hertz pick-up: confirm Swiss vignette (CHF 40) included · confirm cross-border approval for Italy + Slovenia · inspect car thoroughly before leaving

summary.highlights: Fly KEF→ZRH · Hertz pickup · Thun old town + castle · Spiez Castle (Lake Thun vineyards) · Diemtigtal

items: Leave 7:30am → drive ~30 min to Kandersteg
🏔 Oeschinensee — gondola up to turquoise alpine lake at 1,578m · lake walk + photos (~2hrs)
Gondola down · drive ~56 min to Grindelwald · arrive ~11am
⭐ Firstbahn gondola up → First (2,166m) · Cliff Walk (~30 min) · Bachalpsee lake hike (~2.5 miles, ~1.5hrs)
⭐ First Flyer or First Glider — peak memory for the kids · book at the top
⚠️ Leave Grindelwald by 4:30pm — take gondola down from Bort (8 min, saves 1hr)
Rösti lunch in Grindelwald · drive ~5hrs to Munich · arrive ~9:30pm

tags.text: ✓ Gondola Booked · #238070 · 2 adults + 2 children
🏨 Escape by Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe · Conf #6026325459 · $202 ✅

summary.highlights: Oeschinensee gondola · Grindelwald First Cliff Walk · Bachalpsee · First Flyer/Glider

items: Leave Buchloe 7:30am → drive 2h 20min, 203km via A8 → Königssee · arrive ~9:50am
Königssee electric boat 10:30am → trumpet echo at St. Bartholomä → Rothbach Waterfall hike (~3 miles)
Lunch at mountain hut · return boat 12:45pm
Wimbachklamm Gorge (~1 mile, €4/person, open 7am–7pm) — drive 16 min via B305
Drive ~10 min → Wurznwirt, Schneizlreuth · check in ✅

tags.text: ✓ Wurznwirt · #72072251742511 · Family Suite
⏰ Book Königssee boat in advance at seenschifffahrt.de — fills up fast in summer
🏷 Austria Vignette: buy digital vignette at asfinag.at at least 18 days before entry (by June 6)

summary.highlights: Königssee electric boat · St. Bartholomä · Rothbach Waterfall · Wimbachklamm gorge

items: Leave Schneizlreuth 7:30am → ~1hr 30min to Liechtensteinklamm Gorge · arrive ~9am
Deepest gorge in Alps — Helix staircase, 400 stairs, thundering waterfall (~2.5hrs, ~€15/adult)
Drive ~1hr 20min → HOMEBOUND Apartments, Bad Goisern · arrive ~1:30pm ✅
Afternoon: 10 min to Hallstatt for evening lakeside walk

tags.text: ✓ HOMEBOUND Apartments · Expedia #72072198804917

summary.highlights: Liechtensteinklamm gorge (deepest in Alps) · Hallstatt evening walk

items: Arrive Hallstatt 8:45am (before crowds)
Echern Valley → Waldbachstrub Waterfall (~3 miles, ~2.5hrs)
Hallstatt Skywalk (Welterbeblick) — free viewpoint, best panoramic view
Lunch lakeside · afternoon: lake boat or relax
Dinner lakeside — try local char (Saibling)

summary.highlights: Hallstatt full day · Echern Valley waterfall · Skywalk viewpoint · lakeside dinner

items: Checkout 10am
Gosausee — optional (2.85-mile flat loop) · only if energy allows
Drive south → Grossglockner High Alpine Road · arrive ~1pm · glacier views at Pasterze · toll €45/car · pack warm layers · ~2hrs on the road
Drive ~2hrs 30min → arrive Lake Bled ~8:30pm ✅
🧺 Laundry #2 — use washing machine at Pr' Matjon Pension on arrival night

tags.text: 👕 Laundry #2 — hand in at Pr' Matjon on arrival
✓ Pr' Matjon Pension · Expedia #72072265408188
🏷 Slovenia Dars e-Vignette required — buy at evinjeta.dars.si before crossing · Fine €300+ if missing

summary.highlights: Grossglockner High Alpine Road · Pasterze glacier (2,504m) · Arrive Lake Bled

items: 7:30am — Mala Osojnica viewpoint (20-min hike, best view of Bled Island)
Bled Castle — clifftop fortress, panoramic views (~1.5hrs, €13/adult)
Mostnica Gorge — forest trail, Devil's Bridge, ~2 miles
Late afternoon: drive ~20 min to Vogel Cable Car at Bohinj — panoramic Julian Alps views

summary.highlights: Mala Osojnica viewpoint · Bled Castle · Mostnica Gorge · Vogel Cable Car at Bohinj

days.title: Vintgar + Savica + Radovljica 🎂
days.birthday: 🎂 Happy Birthday Veena! — celebrated in one of the most beautiful places on Earth, Lake Bled, Slovenia.

items: 10:00am — Vintgar Gorge (pre-booked timed entry) · 1.6-mile boardwalk over blue-green water (~1.5hrs)
Drive 30 min → Savica Waterfall (78m cascade, 558 steps, ~1.5hrs)
Radovljica old town — medieval town, gingerbread workshop, beekeeping museum (~1hr)
Back to Bled for overnight

sections.heading: 🎂 Birthday Extras
items: Bled cream cake at Park Café — the iconic local dessert, perfect as a birthday treat!
Pletna boat to Bled Island — traditional hand-rowed wooden boat, ring the wishing bell
Special birthday dinner lakeside — try Vila Bled or Restavracija Belvedere

tags.text: ✓ Vintgar Gorge · Invoice PE01-BL0I-808 · €40 · 10:00am entry Jun 29

summary.highlights: Vintgar Gorge · Savica Waterfall · Radovljica · Pletna boat · Veena's birthday dinner 🎉

items: Early checkout (10:30am) · drive west via Passo Falzarego (allow ~3hrs including photo stops)
Lagazuoi cable car (3-min ride to 2,752m · WWI military tunnels with headlamps · ~1.5hrs)
Continue to Außervillgraten · ⚠️ Total drive ~3hrs + Lagazuoi ~2hrs = check in ~6pm
Late afternoon: drive 25 min to Lago di Braies — or save for sunrise Day 12

tags.text: ✓ Das Auss.Zeit · Expedia #72072265941383 · 10.0★
✅ Braies parking: No booking needed. Arrive before 9:30am to drive directly to lake.

summary.highlights: Passo Falzarego · Lagazuoi cable car + WWI tunnels · Lago di Braies

sections.heading: Day 12 — Tre Cime di Lavaredo
items: Optional Lago di Braies sunrise — leave 5:00am · arrive ~6am · magical reflections · back by 8am
Tre Cime di Lavaredo loop (~4.5 miles) — always take Misurina shuttle (€10, fills by 9am)

sections.heading: Day 13 — Cinque Torri
items: Cinque Torri hike (~3 miles) — five dramatic rock towers, WWI trenches, chairlift up
Long Italian lunch in Cortina d'Ampezzo

tags.text: 🧺 Laundry #3 — self-service laundromat in Cortina d'Ampezzo, Jul 2 afternoon

summary.highlights: Lago di Braies sunrise · Tre Cime di Lavaredo loop (4.5 miles)

bookings.text: ✓ No booking needed · arrive early AM

items: Checkout 10am · drive ~1hr 30min → Innsbruck
Nordkette cable car first — up to 2,300m, panoramic Alps views (~2hrs) · weather-dependent, go first
Innsbruck old town — Golden Roof, Maria-Theresien-Strasse, Tyrolean dinner
Drive ~1hr 30min west → Dornbirn · check in ~5:30pm
🧺 Laundry #4 — hotel laundry service at Vienna House Martinspark

tags.text: 👕 Laundry #4 — self-service laundromat in Dornbirn evening
✓ Vienna House Martinspark · Expedia #72072266618761

summary.highlights: Nordkette cable car (2,300m) · Innsbruck Golden Roof · Old town · Drive to Dornbirn

days.title: Liechtenstein → Schaffhausen → Rhine Falls → Zurich
days.meta: Jul 4 · Dornbirn → Vaduz → Rhine Falls → Zurich

items: Leave 9am · drive 28 mi, 33 min → Vaduz, Liechtenstein 🇱🇮
Vaduz Castle viewpoint — hike up to the hilltop castle (free, ~20 min walk) · views over the Rhine valley
Passport stamp at the Vaduz tourist office on Städtle — €3, the kids will love this! · also pick up the official Liechtenstein stamp with their names
Vaduz Kunstmuseum (optional) — striking black cube building, world-class modern art collection · worth 30 min even just for the architecture

Drive 45 mi, 55 min → Schaffhausen old town — Switzerland's best-preserved medieval town · Munot Fortress (round 16th-century fortress, free, climb the tower for views) · cobblestone streets and painted bay windows · ~45 min
Drive 4 mi, 10 min → Rhine Falls (Rheinfall) — largest waterfall in Europe by volume · take the boat to the central rock (CHF 5) · spectacular up-close views · ~1hr
Drive 28 mi, 45 min → Zurich — drop bags at airport hotel first, then head into the city
Zurich Altstadt — Niederdorf quarter, Grossmünster twin towers (climb for views €5), Fraumünster (Chagall windows), Bahnhofstrasse
Lake Zurich — evening walk along the promenade · Bürkliplatz to Zürichhorn · golden hour views of the Alps
Dinner in Zurich — try Zeughauskeller (historic arsenal turned beer hall, massive Swiss portions, very family-friendly) · back at hotel by 9:30pm
Overnight near ZRH airport — Radisson Blu ZRH (walkable to terminal, indoor connection) ✅

tags.text: 🏨 Book Zurich Airport hotel · Radisson Blu ZRH recommended — walkable to terminal via indoor connection
⏰ Set alarm 5:30am Jul 5 — Hertz drop-off 6:30am, flight 7:55am
💳 Rhine Falls boat: CHF 5/person to central rock · cash or card

summary.highlights: Vaduz Castle · passport stamp 🇱🇮 · Schaffhausen Munot Fortress · Rhine Falls boat · Zurich Altstadt · Lake Zurich · Zeughauskeller dinner

items: Return Hertz car at ZRH ~6:30am · drop-off deadline 7:00am · Hertz desk in Arrivals/Ground Transport level · Conf. L5350959316
Depart 7:55am FI571/FI689 via Reykjavík → Orlando MCO 8:50pm

summary.highlights: Hertz drop-off 7am · Depart 7:55am FI571 via KEF → MCO 8:50pm

checklist.label: 🚗 Confirm Italy + Slovenia cross-border at Hertz ZRH

accommodationBreakdown.property: Escape by Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe 🇩🇪 · Night 4

cash.for: Hut lunches, Rhine Falls boat, laundromat, Nordkette
Vintgar, Vogel cable car, Bled Castle
Lagazuoi, Tre Cime shuttle, Cinque Torri

reminders.text: Bring waterproof jackets for Iceland — especially Seljalandsfoss (walk behind the falls)
Late June Iceland = 24hr daylight — bring eye masks
Grossglockner toll €45/car — pack warm layers at 2,504m even in summer
Tre Cime: always take Misurina shuttle (€10), fills by 9am
Nordkette Innsbruck: weather-dependent — go first before old town
ETIAS not required — launches Q4 2026 after your return
Slovenia Dars e-Vignette — buy at evinjeta.dars.si before crossing. Automated cameras, fine €300+ if missing
Austrian digital vignette — buy at asfinag.at by June 6 (18-day waiting period before Jun 24 entry)
Zurich Airport hotel still needed (Jul 4–5). Radisson Blu ZRH is inside the terminal — walkable at 5am. Worth the extra $50 vs a 4:30am shuttle.
Use the HOMEBOUND (Bad Goisern) and Das Auss.Zeit (Außervillgraten) kitchens for dinners — a single restaurant dinner in Switzerland for 4 easily hits $180
Liechtenstein passport stamp €3 at Vaduz tourist office — worth every cent!
